personas.name: Reflective Mood Tracker
personas.description: A user who wants to understand emotions through repeated mood check-ins, reflection, and recognition of emotional patterns over time.
pain_points: Mood tracking tools can feel repetitive or shallow
The user needs questions that support reflection without being burdensome
constraints: Needs saved history to remain accessible

personas.name: Stress Support Seeker
personas.description: A user who turns to the app during stressful or emotionally difficult periods and wants support that is useful and manageable.
goals: Use the app as part of mental health coping
pain_points: Stressful periods make it harder to engage with demanding app interactions
Support feels less useful when the app is inconsistent or overwhelming
constraints: Needs emotional support features that do not create extra burden

personas.name: Insight Oriented Learner
personas.description: A user who values informative content, explanations, and insight that help make sense of mental health patterns or symptoms.
goals: Receive useful insight from app data
Read relevant educational content within the app
pain_points: Some insight can feel too vague or not meaningful enough
Content loses value when it is not clearly useful or understandable
context: Using app insight to improve self-understanding
constraints: Needs insight that feels grounded in tracked data

personas.name: Cost Conscious Evaluator
personas.description: A user who is interested in the app but becomes frustrated when useful functionality is restricted by pricing, subscriptions, or unclear premium boundaries.
goals: Understand what is free and what is paid
Judge whether paid access is worth the cost
pain_points: Subscription handling and premium access can feel unfair or misleading
constraints: Needs visible distinction between free and paid features
Needs access information before payment decisions

personas.name: Privacy Sensitive User
personas.description: A user who is highly concerned about trust, privacy, and the handling of sensitive mental health data within the app.
goals: Trust the app before continuing to use sensitive features
pain_points: Third party data sharing concerns can make the app unusable
constraints: Needs privacy information before sensitive actions
Needs confidence that data handling is transparent
